title: ranunculus pumilio var. politus
intro: Ranunculus pumilio var. politus, also known as small buttercup, is a type of flowering plant in the Ranunculaceae family. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture or infused in oil to be used in herbal preparations, such as creams and ointments, for topical application.
